heroSubtitle: Your privacy matters to us at FITFINDER.
introText: FITFINDER is a graduation project developed by CSED2026 students at Alexandria University. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle user data while using the FITFINDER web application.
infoItem1: Images uploaded by users for visual search purposes
infoItem3: Favorite products saved by logged-in users
infoItem4: Basic authentication data for registered users
usageItem1: To perform clothing segmentation and visual search
usageItem2: To improve search accuracy and user experience
usageItem4: To provide features such as history and favorites
usageItem5: For academic and demonstration purposes only
storageText1: Uploaded images and related data are stored only for the duration necessary to provide the requested functionality. FITFINDER is not intended for commercial use and
thirdPartyText: FITFINDER may redirect users to third-party websites to view or purchase products. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those external websites.
choicesText: Users may choose to use FITFINDER without creating an account. Logged-in users may manage their history and favorite items at any time.
